response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience, particularly in full-stack and web technologies, but his background lacks direct alignment with the embedded networking and security-focused requirements of this role. His C/C++ experience is limited and not recent, and there is no clear evidence of Japanese language proficiency or deep embedded firmware development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and software development experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta).
Demonstrated ability to work with low-latency and high-performance systems (e.g., at Sociomantic).
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership (workshops, talks).
concerns: Lacks recent or extensive experience with C programming for embedded systems or Linux kernel development.
No evidence of Japanese language proficiency (required for the role).
Background is heavily web and application-focused, with minimal exposure to networking or security technologies listed in the job description.
